structDeepRules.message: Decorator '@Component', '@ComponentV2', or '@CustomDialog' is missing for struct 'NoDecorator'.

structBuildRules.message: The struct 'NoBuildMethod' must have at least and at most one 'build' method.
solutions: A structurally modified page must have at least one and no more than one 'build' method.

structBuildRules.message: The struct 'DuplicateBuild' must have at least and at most one 'build' method.
solutions: A structurally modified page must have at least one and no more than one 'build' method.

entryValidationDeep.message: A page can't contain more than one '@Entry' decorator.
A page configured in 'main_pages.json or build-profile.json5' must have one and only one '@Entry' decorator.
solutions: Please make sure that the splash page has one and only one '@Entry' decorator.

decoratorConflictRules.message: Regular variable 'trackedCount' can not be decorated with '@Watch'.
Duplicate '@Builder' decorators for method are not allowed.
